side_effects.description: severe neuro reactions like a traumatic brain injury from benzyl alcohol in peptide solutions

protocol_notes: Tested positive for IgG/IgM reaction to benzenes. Peptides mixed with benzyl alcohol. Had same response to HRT in benzyl alcohol solution. Described as chemical brain injury. Tested positive via Cyrex Labs chemical immune panel. Has not tried mixing peptides with sterile saline, which is more common in Europe.
